prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/321-sheet.numbers in Numbers. Select cells A1 and B1 together, then merge them (Table menu > Merge Cells, or right-click the selection > Merge Cells). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'numbers merge_cells ~/Desktop/kinbench/321-sheet.numbers "Sheet 1" A1:B1'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/321-merge-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
